Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Mar-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. JONATHAN KASHANI, Esq. of The Law Office of Jonathan M. Kashani, P.L.C. (Tel: 888-527-4128) for Plaintiff.
Atty. MEGUMI HORIUCHI, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP (Tel: 415-652-0186) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'s Motion To Dismiss For Forum Non Conveniens.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order granting defendant's motion to dismiss for forum non conveniens (see signed order for complete ruling). (302/RBU)*****

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Feb-15-2024 Continued To Mar-04-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. JONATHAN KASHANI, Esq. of The Law Office of Jonathan M. Kashani, P.L.C. (Tel: 888-527-4128) for Plaintiff.
Atty. MEGUMI HORIUCHI, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP (Tel: 415-652-0186) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'s Motion To Dismiss For Forum Non Conveniens.

Matter discussed. The Court notes the opposition was filed late. The Court will consider the opposition. The Court states briefing is closed. The Court continues the matter to March 4, 2024 at 9:30 A.M. in Department 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
